name: glucose-trend-chart
title: Glucose Trend Chart
description: Glucose over time against an individualised target band, with meal and dose markers. Unit and target are required — neither has a default.

props.name: unit
props.description: Required. The two differ by roughly 18 times.

props.name: target
props.description: Required. Individualised — there is no population default.

props.name: hypo / hyper
props.description: Urgent thresholds from the care plan. Points beyond them are drawn as triangles, not merely recoloured.

props.name: markers
props.description: Meals and doses, supplied by the caller.

clinicalNotes: The unit and the target band are both required and neither is defaulted, because a component that guessed either would be guessing about harm: a reading of 7 is unremarkable in mmol/L and profoundly hypoglycaemic in mg/dL, and a value that is a hypo for one patient is a target for another. Urgent readings differ in shape as well as colour, so the warning survives greyscale, print, and colour-blindness. Meals and doses are markers only — a fall after insulin is alignment in time, not proof of cause.
notes: Pairs with time-in-range-bar. Composes chart + reference-range-band.
